subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose book hath attained unto the presence of the Mother Book, Who calleth the peoples in the Most Great Prison unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز کتابه بلحاظ ام الکتاب الذی یدع الامم فی السجن الاعظم الی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
